name: matrix
description: Matrix Client-Server API channel for RustyTalon — polls any homeserver for new messages and responds in-room

required_secrets.name: matrix_access_token
required_secrets.prompt: Enter your Matrix access token (generate in Element: Settings → Help & About → Access Token, or via /login)

homeserver.description: Matrix homeserver URL (e.g. https://matrix.org or your self-hosted server).

owner_id.description: Your Matrix user ID (e.g. @user:matrix.org). Only messages from this user will be processed.

dm_policy.description: Who can send DMs to the bot.

allow_from.description: Additional Matrix user IDs allowed to send messages (comma-separated).
